inputs.label: Gross Pay per Period
inputs.businessContext: Enter the gross pay for the pay period

inputs.label: Employee SS Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Social security tax rate for employee (e.g., 6.2%)

inputs.label: Employer SS Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Social security tax rate for employer (e.g., 6.2%)

inputs.label: Annual Wage Ceiling
inputs.businessContext: Maximum amount of annual earnings subject to social security tax

inputs.label: Pay Periods per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of pay periods per year (e.g., 12 for monthly, 26 for bi-weekly)
